reserved_for_capstone.title: Cross-project risk and dependency detection
reserved_for_capstone.description: Tracy oversees two unrelated projects whose teams occasionally share resources or timelines. A Claude agent reviews both projects' Jira Plans and DragonBoat roadmap entries alongside recent meeting transcripts to surface shared blockers, overlapping milestones, and cross-team dependencies that Tracy needs to raise at the next leadership meeting.
artifacts: prioritized cross-project risk and dependency summary
reserved_for_capstone.reservation_reason: Confirmed by user at Step 2 normalization review. This scenario requires Tracy to synthesize skills from all 16 chapters — multi-source aggregation (ch01, ch06, ch11), context management (ch04, ch05), agent design (ch11, ch12), browser/SaaS automation (ch09, ch10), human-in-the-loop checkpoints (ch13), and governance (ch15). It is the only scenario that spans both concurrent projects simultaneously, making it unseen at chapter scope and maximally integrative at capstone scope.
reserved_for_capstone.chapters_forbidden_from_using_this_scena: all — chapters 01 through 16 MUST NOT reference or consume scenario-02 in any example, worked problem, quiz item, or exercise

notes: ChapterTextGenerator, ExerciseGenerator, QuizGenerator, PresentationGenerator, PodcastGenerator, and CompanionGenerator MUST NOT consume scenario-02. The forbidden_examples field in every chapter's common envelope will carry this entry at runtime.
